name: Chicken Salad Tea Sandwiches with Smoked Almonds
recipeIngredient: 2 whole boneless chicken breasts with skin
24 slices homemade-style white bread, sliced very thin
recipeInstructions:
1. In a deep skillet, bring the chicken broth or water to a boil. Add the chicken breasts in one layer.
2. Reduce heat and poach the chicken at a bare simmer, turning once, for 7 minutes.
3. Remove the skillet from the heat and let the chicken cool in the cooking liquid for 20 minutes. Discard the skin and shred the chicken fine.
4. In a bowl, stir together the shredded chicken, 1/2 cup of mayonnaise, shallot, tarragon, and season with salt and pepper to taste.
5. Make 12 sandwiches using the chicken salad and bread. Press gently to combine.
6. With a 2-inch round cutter, cut 2 rounds from each sandwich.
7. Place almonds on a small plate. Spread the edges of the rounds with the remaining 1/2 cup of mayonnaise to coat well.
8. Roll each edge in almonds. The sandwiches can be made up to two hours ahead and wrapped in plastic wrap before chilling.
